title: Coryphopteris lauterbachii
taxonomy: Coryphopteris lauterbachii is a species of fern in the family Thelychriedaceae. It belongs to the genus Coryphopteris, which is a part of the division Pteridophyta. Within the division Pteridophyta, the division is further divided into two main groups, but the family Thelychriedaceae is part of the group Osmundophyllinae. Coryphopteris lauterbachii is native to New Guinea.
